message:
Remove WebSocket terminology from Platform TLS section

Users don't need to know about the underlying WebSocket protocol.
Simplified to just reference the node-to-platform connection.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -280,15 +280,11 @@ tls-min-version: "1.2"
 # OpenSSL cipher list for platform connections
 tls-ciphers: "ECDHE-ECDSA-AES128-GCM-SHA256:ECDHE-RSA-AES128-GCM-SHA256"
 
-# Other platform plugin settings...
-# control-endpoint: wss://ws.app.tenzir.com
-# skip-peer-verification: false
-# cacert: /path/to/ca-bundle.crt
 ```
 
-These options only affect WebSocket connections from the node to the Tenzir
-Platform. If not specified, the plugin falls back to the node-level
-`tenzir.tls.min-version` and `tenzir.tls.ciphers` settings.
+These options only affect the connection from the node to the Tenzir Platform.
+If not specified, the settings fall back to the node-level `tenzir.tls.min-version`
+and `tenzir.tls.ciphers` settings.
 
 ### List plugins
